creator: lexa@libraw.com
text:
(In reply to Kyle Evans from comment #33)

tried:
dtrace -n 'fbt:::return /(int)arg1 == EPERM && pid == $pid/ { stack(); }' -c '/usr/sbin/jail -c example'

it says:
dtrace: description 'fbt::return ' matched 36022 probes
and provides 1.7MB output/ 48k lines.

Probably this is not you're looking for.

Sorry, I'm FreeBSD user, not developer, know nothing about dtrace, so I can run test command sequences in monkey mode, but I'm unable to modify your one-liner for better match.
